title: `utf8mb4_0900_bin` shouldn't write `RestoredData`
poc: create table t (id varchar(255) primary key clustered, a varchar(255) collate utf8mb4_0900_bin, b varchar(255) collate utf8mb4_bin, key idx(a, b));
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_bin, description VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_bin);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, value VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_bin, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT /*+USE_INDEX(test_table, idx)*/ * FROM test_table WHERE name = 'example' AND description IS NOT NULL;
